sentences.arabic: أُخَطِّطُ لِرِحْلَةٍ سِيَاحِيَّةٍ إِلَى مِصْرَ فِي الصَّيْفِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Planiram turističko putovanje u Egipat sljedećeg ljeta.
sentences.translationEn: I am planning a tourist trip to Egypt next summer.

sentences.arabic: أُرِيدُ رُؤْيَةَ الْأَهْرَامَاتِ وَرُكُوبَ السَّفِينَةِ فِي نَهْرِ النِّيلِ.
sentences.translation: Želim vidjeti piramide i voziti se brodom rijekom Nil.
sentences.translationEn: I want to see the pyramids and ride a boat on the Nile River.

sentences.arabic: سَأَسَافِرُ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي بِالطَّائِرَةِ مِنْ مَطَارِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovat ću sa svojom porodicom avionom sa gradskog aerodroma.
sentences.translationEn: I will travel with my family by plane from the city airport.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثْتُ عَنْ مَعْلُومَاتٍ حَوْلَ الطَّقْسِ وَالْأَمَاكِنِ السَّيَاحِيَّةِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tražio sam informacije o vremenu i poznatim turističkim mjestima.
sentences.translationEn: I searched for information about the weather and famous tourist places.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ مُتَحَمِّسُونَ جِدّاً لِهَذِهِ الْمُغَامَرَةِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma smo uzbuđeni zbog ove nove avanture.
sentences.translationEn: We are very excited about this new adventure.
